message:
test: Update CLI and core tests for environment injection pattern

Comprehensive test updates to utilize the new environment injection
pattern for isolated, reliable testing:

CLI Test Updates:
- credentials.test.ts: Rewrites tests to use per-test temp directories
  via injected env.HOME and env.XDG_CONFIG_HOME, eliminates shared
  state between tests, adds coverage for edge cases
- api-client.test.ts: Updates tests to inject env into ApiClient,
  adds tests for environment variable precedence, improves mock setup
- collections.test.ts: Updates to pass env through auth helpers,
  reorganizes test structure for clarity

Core Test Updates:
- tokenize.test.ts: Adds test cases for single-letter allowlist
  (C and R language tokens), verifies behavior of preserved tokens

Test Isolation Benefits:
- Each test uses fresh temp directory
- No cross-test pollution of credentials
- Parallel test execution safe
- Predictable environment per test case

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
